content.en:
"No problem!"

Ye Tian responded to the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor and them.

However, the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor, and the Demon Demon Dao Ancestor were worried that Ye Tian's strength was not strong enough and he would be killed by the Ghost Prince, so it was enough to let Ye Tian hide behind the three of them to assist.

Ye Tian shuttled over and directly cast the forbidden realm.

Rumble!!!!

The forbidden realm directly covered the battle area of the four people, constantly confronting the ghost domain.

The Ghost Domain is actually a supreme Dao technique that mimics the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the Forbidden Domain is a manifestation of the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain, which is equivalent to a reduced version.

Therefore, the forbidden realm directly confronted the ghost domain, which was a supreme dao technique.

The suppression disappeared, and Ye Tian suppressed the ghost boy all the time, so that the balance of the battle was directly reversed.

I saw that the three Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestors directly began to suppress the ghost boy and constantly inflict damage on him.

"Damn, Nine Extremes Heavenly King, you are looking for death!"

The ghost boy was furious.

Originally, he didn't take Dao Ancestor like the Nine Extremes Heavenly King in his eyes at all, even if the other party's talent was high, but after all, it didn't take long to break through Dao Ancestor.

But he never expected that it was this inconspicuous Nine Extremes Heavenly King who was getting him into trouble now.

If there was no Nine Extremes Heavenly King, he could definitely easily defeat the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestors and them, once these Dao Ancestors were dragged, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor could successfully refine the Forbidden Void Realm and become the Lord of the One Realm.

At that time, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor controlled the Forbidden Void Realm, and he could easily suppress this group of Dao Ancestors, and it would be easy to kill them.

At that time, the loss of a large number of Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors by the major forces will definitely be enough to make them extremely excited, and the Heavenly Demon Sect will also take advantage of the situation to rise.

But in this situation, he couldn't hold back the Dao Ancestors of the Three Nine Heavens Forces and the Three Eight Heavens Forces at all.

Bang bang bang!!

The ghost boy withstood the attacks of the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor again and again, and gradually had injuries on his body.

At this rate, it won't be long before he loses.

Once he was defeated, the Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace would collapse, and the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestors would no longer be able to continue refining the Forbidden Void Realm.

As time slowly passed, the ghost boy became more and more injured, and his combat effectiveness began to decline, which is a very bad phenomenon.

Abrupt.

The ghost boy threw out a black spike, which was a top-level forbidden strange object, and a one-time attack forbidden strange object, with his extreme power of the Seven Heavens, it was enough to be called a big killing weapon.

And the target of his throw was not the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor, and the Demon Fu Dao Ancestor, but the Nine Extremes Heavenly King Ye Tian.

Although Ye Tian sensed the attack, he didn't have time to dodge it.

The primeval desolate body was broken, and the Nine Turns Immortal Golden Body could not be blocked, and the layers of defense were blasted through, directly penetrating Ye Tian's forbidden body.

And the forbidden body of the Dacheng level was also hit hard, which shows how terrifying the power of this blow is.

However, this blow still did not kill Ye Tian, but only severely injured Ye Tian.

"Forbidden Origin Power, Repair!"

Under the repair of countless forbidden origin powers, Ye Tian's injuries recovered at a speed that was visible to the naked eye.

The ghost boy who saw this scene was dumbfounded, he couldn't kill Ye Tian with one blow.

"Damn, this guy turned out to be a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is also a very strong Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the intelligence doesn't say that this guy is a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor at most, but it's just a little more difficult to kill than an ordinary Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!"

The ghost boy said angrily.

The ghost boy did not kill Ye Tian, but the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, the Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor, and the Demon Demon Dao Ancestor seized the gap between the ghost boy and the all-out attack on Ye Tian, and directly broke out the hole card attack.

Three terrifying killing moves directly penetrated the body of the ghost boy, directly injuring him to serious injuries.

This serious injury directly put the ghost boy in a desperate situation.

The ghost boy is constantly shuttling in the ghost domain, while Ye Tian and the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor are constantly chasing and killing the ghost boy.

What's more, the opening of the ghost domain will always consume the power of the ghost son.

Soon, the ghost boy directly put away the ghost domain.

"You deal with the ghost boy, I'll help the other Dao Ancestors!"

The Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor spoke.

"Good!"

Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor nodded.

Anyway, the ghost boy has been hit hard, and the strength of him and Fu Mo Daozu is enough to suppress the ghost boy.

Moreover, just now, the ghost domain enveloped the whole audience, the three major Nine Heaven forces and the Dao Ancestors of the three Eight Heaven Forces could be suppressed very badly, and now they are injured one by one, if they don't help those Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, their major forces are estimated to fall a lot of Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

Swish!

The Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor joined the battlefield of the other Dao Ancestors, helping the other Dao Ancestors to kill the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Demon Sect.

The Evil Buddha Dao Ancestor was so powerful, he joined forces with other Dao Ancestors and easily suppressed one by one the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the situation was reversed in an instant.

Soon, a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor fell.

It didn't take long for the Heavenly Emperor Palace to fall to reach twenty Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and such a loss was enough to make the Heavenly Emperor Palace feel distressed.

The other side.

Under the siege of Ye Tian, Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor and Fu Demon Dao Ancestor, the ghost boy kept coughing up blood.

Ye Tian is not afraid of the seriously injured ghost boy now, he doesn't need to hide in the rear, but attacks while assisting, and the ghost boy's body is constantly cracked.

"No, if this continues, I'm afraid I'll fall and die!"

The ghost boy thought to himself.

He didn't want to die, he still wanted to advance to the Strongest Dao Ancestor, and then be promoted to the Invincible Dao Ancestor, how could he fall here!

As for the orders of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he doesn't care about anything.

The Heavenly Demon Sect and the Heavenly Emperor Palace are only cooperating, ostensibly taking refuge, but the Heavenly Demon Sect also has enough autonomy.

Now, he is about to fall, and it is normal not to help the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace cannot reprimand him.

Immediately.

The ghost boy used an escape treasure to tear the void and leave, not daring to stay here any longer.

"Don't chase it! The ghost boy has a lot of treasures, if you really want to chase it, I don't know how long you have to chase it, and it is important to interrupt the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor to refine the Forbidden Void Realm!"

Ye Tian and Fu Demon Dao Ancestor also had no idea of chasing and killing, and the three of them rushed to the location where Shi Ying Dao Ancestor was, wanting to break the large array protecting Shi Ying Dao Ancestor.

At this time, the other Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were completely dragged down, and there was no way to stop the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestors at all

"It's not good, this big array can't stop for long!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor's expression changed drastically.

But now that he is refining the Forbidden Void Realm with all his strength, at most he can only have a trace of his mind, and there is no way to fight back at all.

Thundered!!!

The Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor and several people continued to attack the large array, and in just a few blows, the large array was about to shatter.

Then.

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor gritted his teeth, and was so painful that he took out a forbidden treasure handed over to him by the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

This is a forbidden treasure that can trap people, and it only has a one-time effect, even the strongest Dao Ancestor can easily trap it, and its value is incomparably high.

Once used, this forbidden treasure is gone.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace has explained that this forbidden treasure must not be used unless it is absolutely necessary.

But now, he had to use it!
